Dakar Continental Information

Dakar Continental FIR is a Flight Information Region that spans multiple countries, namely Senegal (in full), Mauritania (in full), Ivory Coast (in full), Guinea-Bissau (partially), Mali (partially) and a slice of airspace from Burkina Faso.

Dakar Oceanic is part of the Dakar FIR, but operational purposes, we've split it from Dakar Continental.

Airport Coverage

Dakar Continental covers the following airports:

Senegal

ICAO Name City Status Remarks
GOBD Blaise Diagne Intl Dakar-Diass - -
GOGG Ziguinchor Ziguinchor Not Available -
GOGK Sare Bidji Kolda Not Available -
GOGS Cap Skirring Intl Cap Skirring Not Available -
GOOK Kaolack Kaolack Not Available -
GOOY Leopold Sedar Senghor Dakar Not Available -
GOSM Ouro Sogui Matam Not Available -
GOSP Podor Podor Not Available -
GOSR Richard Toll Richard Toll Not Available -
GOSS St Louis St Louis Not Available -
GOTB Bakel Bakel Not Available -
GOTS Simenti Simenti Not Available -
GOTT Tambacounda Tambacounda Not Available -

This page is a subsection of the Senegal country page.
